title: Fleet SHA Pin
description: Reviewer-emitted machine substrate that records the exact branch SHA inspected at PASS time. Approved records are valid only while the branch HEAD still equals reviewed_sha; a moved branch requires force re-review. Post-merge deleted branches are N/A only when a merged marker is present.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bump on breaking changes.

review_id.description: Stable identifier for this review run.

reviewed_sha.description: Exact 40-hex git commit SHA the reviewer inspected.

branch.description: Branch whose HEAD must still equal reviewed_sha while the task is unmerged.

verdict.description: Only approve/PASS records are enforced; non-approving records are schema-valid but skipped.

merged.description: Optional post-merge marker. If true and the branch is unknown/deleted, the SHA-pin check is N/A rather than a failure.

superseded.description: When true, this approve record is historical only (HEAD moved; a newer sha-pin supersedes it).

supersedes_review_id.description: Optional link to the review_id this record replaces after a fix-round push.
